{{Quote|Your father's name was Tryst Veila, your mother's was Cassa. They were moisture farmers on Tatooine|Sliven, to Tahiri Veila|<ref name="Promises" />}}
'''Tryst Veila''' was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who fathered the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Tahiri Veila]] with his wife [[Cassa Veila]]. Both Tryst and his wife were strong in [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], though they were never trained, as the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] had been virtually wiped out by then.

==Biography==
{{Quote|It took almost two months for me to heal. Several times in the first weeks I almost died, and I would have if not for Cassa and Tryst. They showed me kindness I never knew existed.|Sliven, about Tryst Veila|<ref name="Promises" />}}
In [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], Tryst and Cassa befriended an injured [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] named [[Sliven]]. They became friends quickly despite the hostility between the settlers and the Tusken Raiders. Tryst would learn from Sliven how to wield a [[Gaderffii/Legends|gaderffii]]. One day, he was enjoying a gaderffi sparring session outside his home with Sliven. Sliven's tribe caught sight of this however, and assumed that Sliven was under attack. Mistaking them for enemies, he and Cassa were killed by the tribe before Sliven could stop them.<ref name="Promises" />

Out of pity and in return for the kindness shown to him by them, Sliven adopted a then-three-year-old Tahiri and raised her as a Tusken Raider until she turned nine in [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], when she was discovered to be Force-sensitive by [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Tionne Solusar]] during a trip to [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. She would only learn about it during a return trip to Tatooine from the [[Jedi Praxeum]].<ref name="Promises" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|One day, I even fashioned Tryst his own gaderffii and taught him how to fight with it. He learned quickly—it was strange how he fought, sensing my movements almost before I made them, just as Cassa could feel my emotions without hearing me speak.|Sliven, about Tryst Veila|<ref name="Promises" />}}
Tryst Veila was a kind hearted individual as shown when he and his wife took in an injured Sliven despite him being a Tusken Raider. Veila could also use [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] and it allowed him to learn fighting with a gaderffii, easily beating Sliven during a sparring session.<ref name="Promises" />

Veila had green [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="Promises" />

==Behind the scenes==
Tryst Veila was a character created by author [[Nancy Richardson Fischer|Nancy Richardson]] for the [[1996]] novel ''[[Junior Jedi Knights: Promises]]'', the third volume in the ''[[Star Wars: Junior Jedi Knights]]'' series.<ref name="Promises" />
